title: OKX Gateway Config
description: Venue-specific configuration for the OKX trading gateway. This object is stored under provided_config.venue_config and consumed by the native OKX Rust adaptor.

demo_mode.description: Use OKX demo trading endpoints. When true, default WebSocket URLs resolve to the wspap.okx.com demo hosts.

api_base_url.description: Base HTTPS URL for OKX REST API requests.

ws_public_url.description: Optional override for the OKX public WebSocket endpoint. If omitted, the runtime derives the default from demo_mode.

ws_private_url.description: Optional override for the OKX private WebSocket endpoint. If omitted, the runtime derives the default from demo_mode.

secret_ref.description: Pilot/Vault path for the OKX credential bundle. The runtime reads `apikey`, `secretkey`, and `passphrase` from this secret.
